message:
refactor(cli): add robot_workflow_status_error_code mapping with stable constants

Add ROBOT_ERR_POLICY_DENIED, ROBOT_ERR_WORKFLOW_ABORTED,
ROBOT_ERR_WORKFLOW_ERROR, ROBOT_ERR_WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND constants.
Extract robot_workflow_status_error_code() function mapping workflow
status to the appropriate robot error code. Refactor workflow response
dispatch to use the mapping instead of ad-hoc string construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
